summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for Fruitee social media campaign platform. Tested 15+ pages including landing page navigation, authentication, dashboard analytics, content calendar, influencer selection, and profile pages. All major functionality working correctly with excellent design implementation.

ui_bugs.issue: User type dropdown selector not clickable due to overlay issues

issues: Minor overlay interference from Emergent badge
affected_screen: Content Plan and other pages with bottom-right buttons

passed_tests: Landing page with 16 navigation cards renders correctly
Sign In form with email/password authentication works
Dashboard with 4 analytics charts (Area, Line, Pie, Bar) displays perfectly
Content Plan calendar with 11 content items and month navigation
Influencer Selection with filters, search, and multi-selection functionality
Business Profile and Brands pages with forms and upload areas
Warm cream background color (#FFF8F0) applied correctly
Recharts library rendering 30+ SVG chart elements
Navigation between all pages working correctly
Mock data displaying properly throughout application
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix user type dropdown selector in Sign Up form to handle overlay issues properly. Consider adjusting z-index or click handling for dropdown options.
